_comment: PREFERRED: run `python capture-proof/install_hooks.py` — it merges these five Claude Code hooks into your settings.json with the correct absolute paths resolved from your checkout (no editing). This file is a manual-merge REFERENCE: replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/agent-histograph with your clone's path. Stop ignores its matcher; PreCompact with no matcher fires for both manual and auto; SessionEnd fires on clear/logout/exit (cannot block); PostToolUse fires on state-changing tools (Edit|Write|MultiEdit|NotebookEdit|Bash) AND observation tools (Read|Grep|Glob|Task|Agent|WebFetch|WebSearch) so the histograph live-activity stream moves during exploration, not just edits — but only MUTATING tools contribute `paths` (a Read/search records a live-stream-only `target`, never a 'touched path', so the audit signals stay edit-scoped). The hooks only CAPTURE when AGENTLOG_CAPTURE_ACTIVE=1 is set in that session's environment — installed but un-armed they only passively log, so installing this cannot disrupt your normal sessions. AGENTLOG_DISABLE=1 no-ops everything.
